Business modules

Settings Hub

One place for people, organisation, roles, data & cross-module sync.

📱 Display mode

How this device shows the app. Saved on this device — your store tablet and a phone can each keep their own.

🌐 Language / भाषा

Choose the language for the labels on this screen. Saved on this device.

🔎 Text size

Make on-screen text larger for easier reading. Saved on this device.

👥 Common Employee Master

One verified staff list. Syncs into Payroll & Leave. Provides name suggestions for Grooming, Service and Cash entries.

Edit existing entries or import detected names from saved module data. Sync is safe — it won't delete attendance or leave records.

📋 Master list

Edit, deactivate or archive. Archived records remain for traceability.

🏛️ Organisation master

Single source of truth for firms & branches. Feeds Payroll letterheads, Tax firm master and report headers. Published to modules via the integration bus.

Edit and Save, then tap Publish to modules. Existing module data is never overwritten — only blank defaults are seeded.

🏢 Firms

🏬 Branches / stores

🗂️ Shared masters

One source of truth for every module (Phase 1). Employees live under People, firms/branches under Organisation. Manage brands, vendors and customers here. From Phase 2, modules read these directly so you add each item only once.

🏷️ Brands / products

🧾 Vendors / payees

👤 Customers

🔗 Cross-module sync

The integration event-bus links all modules. Every flow is an idempotent event — this is the live audit trail.

⚠️ Exceptions

Aggregated red-flags across every module (floor gate, open leads, unlocked stock, cash, vouchers, statutory).

⚙️ Integration rules

Tune cross-module behaviour. Applies immediately on save.

🧩 Module settings (detected)

Read-only view of each module's saved settings on this device. Deep edits stay inside each module.

🧾 Recent integration log

💾 Backup & restore

Manual JSON backup of all module data on this device. The app also keeps a private daily safety copy inside the app's own storage (not readable by other apps). To move to a new phone or survive an uninstall, use “Back up → Share to Drive” — the on-device copy is wiped if the app is removed.

📦 Full migration export

A complete one-file export for moving to the new system. It is the full backup plus a manifest — app/build version, a per-key record-count inventory, and a staff name→ID map — so the rebuild can import your data deterministically. Photos & QMS archive ride along when available. File is named SaagarCC_migration_<date>.json.

🔄 Reset a single module

Removes saved data for one module only. A rollback snapshot is taken first.

🧹 Factory reset — clear ALL app data

Wipes every module's saved data on this device (stock, staff, payroll, expenses, service, leave, tax, employee master, settings) for a clean start. A backup is auto-exported first. This cannot be undone.

🗄️ Archive data older than 12 months

Exports day-records (stock, staff register, grooming) older than 12 months to a JSON file (Documents/SaagarBCC-Backups + a download), then removes them from this device to free space. Masters, payroll, tax and ledgers are kept. Keep the exported file safe — this cannot be undone.

🔒 Admin lock is on. Unlock to access destructive tools.

📊 Stored data summary

Everything saved by this app on this device.

👑 This device has no Admin PIN yet. If you are the owner, set your Admin PIN now to claim the device before staff use it.

🔒 Admin mode

Admin mode unlocks reset tools and Payroll / Tax modules. Locked by default.

Locked

👤 Staff sign-in (accountability)

Record who is using this device so actions are attributed by name in the audit log. Accountability only — it does not encrypt data or replace the Admin PIN.

Shared device

⏱️ Auto-lock admin

Owner mode locks itself after inactivity or when the app is backgrounded, so a walked-away device does not stay unlocked. Raises the bar against a hands-on staffer; it is not tamper-proof on a shared device.

🔒 Lock app at launch

When on, the app asks for the Admin PIN once every time it starts. It uses the same Admin PIN — there is no separate password, so if the PIN is forgotten the app cannot be opened until the app data is reset. Unlocking only opens the app; it does not switch the device into Owner mode.

🎭 Current role (this device)

Pick who is using this device. Each role only opens the modules enabled for it below. The Owner (admin mode) always sees everything.

Roles are a convenience filter on a shared device, not a security boundary — Payroll & Tax stay PIN-protected, but other modules can still be reached by someone with device/file access. Raising to a higher-access role now needs the Admin PIN.

🗝️ Module access by role

Turn each module on or off per role. Owner & Store Manager default to all. Changes apply the next time a module is opened.

🔑 Change admin PIN

Update the PIN used to unlock admin tools on this device.

🛡️ Protected modules

Require admin PIN to open Payroll and Tax modules from staff view. This restricts the in-app view only — it does not encrypt the data on the device (a device backup/restore or direct file access could still read it).

🔒 Unlock admin to access these settings.

🩺 System diagnostics

Storage, module integrity, employee sync and startup errors.

💾 Storage engine

Live engine health & on-device footprint (read-only).

🔐 Encryption probe (R0-W2 · S0)

Read-only device capability check for the planned at-rest encryption: WebCrypto availability + a timed AES-256-GCM round-trip on a synthetic 15 MB blob. Writes NOTHING to storage.

📜 Audit trail

Every write & admin action is logged on this device.

📱 About

Saagar Traders — Business Control Centre
App ID: com.saagartraders.bcc
Shell version: V5.5
APK build: 2.7
Build flavor: —
Modules: — embedded
Build date: —

👤 Owner name

Used in the greeting and shared briefs.

🌟 What's new in V5.5

  • All reports & payroll documents now print as crisp, selectable PDFs — no more screenshots
  • On-screen print preview everywhere, with Save to Documents and Send to WhatsApp
  • Payroll: native salary slips, salary register, statutory summary, advance vouchers & HR letters (single, ZIP, or one combined PDF)
  • Compliance calendar: multiple firms + updated FY 2026-27 statutory due dates
  • Queue (QMS): fair CRO allocation & rotation, pre-claims, and fairness reports
  • View past-date records across modules (read-only)
  • Watch "before & after" photos on service job cards
  • Mobile-friendly layouts across all modules
  • Stability: fixed a Queue-screen crash on the phone
